title: taraxacum officinale f. commutatum
intro: Taraxacum officinale f. commutatum, commonly known as the common dandelion or bitter dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals such as potassium and iron. The health benefits of Taraxacum officinale f. commutatum include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it useful in treating various conditions such as liver and kidney diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
